title: Oracle Data Deep Dive NYC: AI-First Database Platform Redesign
summary: At the Oracle Data Deep Dive event in New York on April 1, Oracle unveiled a redesigned database architecture built for AI. The platform unifies OCI, Autonomous AI Database, and OCI Enterprise AI for rapid creation and scaling of agentic AI applications with enterprise-grade security.

title: Oracle AI Data Platform for U.S. Federal Government — FedRAMP High
summary: Oracle announced the AI Data Platform for U.S. federal agencies. Running in FedRAMP High Government Cloud with IL4/IL5 support, it includes Autonomous AI Database with AI Vector Search, Select AI for natural language queries, and Oracle Analytics with AI-powered assistants.

title: Oracle APEX 26.1: APEXlang, AI in Interactive Reports, and New Enterprise Features
summary: Oracle is preparing APEX 26.1 with game-changing features: APEXlang — a text-based app specification format, AI assistant in Interactive Reports for natural language queries, Pattern Pages for component reuse, and an updated Universal Theme with mobile capabilities.

title: Oracle Secures $16B Financing for Massive AI Data Center
summary: Related Digital is finalizing $16 billion in financing for a giant Oracle data center. This adds to other massive projects: $38B for facilities in Texas and Wisconsin, $18B in New Mexico. Oracle is scaling AI infrastructure to meet surging demand for cloud AI services.
